name: Donald Trump
summary: Day 63 Thursday. TRUMP TELLS AXIOS HE REJECTS IRAN'S HORMUZ-FIRST PROPOSAL — 'BLOCKADE MORE EFFECTIVE THAN BOMBING. THEY ARE CHOKING LIKE A STUFFED PIG' — EXTENDED ECONOMIC WARFARE NOW FORMAL DOCTRINE. The Apr 29 Axios exclusive interview converts 24-48 hours of operational evidence (extended-blockade preparation + rifle-photo Truth Social) into formal-on-record presidential doctrine. Full quote: 'The blockade is somewhat more effective than the bombing. They are choking like a stuffed pig. And it is going to be worse for them. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
